Good evening i have been hearing the term wheel jail very often in some relate information on the game...
What does it mean?
wheel jail means when u lock onto one wheel to +12
aka get 16 copies of
Some players used to recommend pulling multiple standard wheels to +12. Now I think most people just say pull titans blade to +12 and then pull standard characters with the buffs they got.

I see thanks.
Also apart front titan's blade what other wheel would you recommend?
i dont think theres much else from standard

I don't think I would recommend any from standard other than titans blade. The one other wheel that is a maybe is lighthouse if you have clem and want to run a twisted twins black cov setup with her. And even then you can just use lighthouse at e3 and an sr wheel.
Reccomend pulling for characters instead

Hello! I have E3 with E3 wheel. Lv70 SF10. Dream of med with Aliem/RM/DmgAmp/RM/DmgAmp/RM. I use her with Castor Winkle and Kath. 
Try to always play her 1 cost as first card IF i don't have to defend for very high. In that case I play Castor def (he's on White Twin). Winkle is there for Aliamus battery and Keybot. And more defense if needed. Castor oc for defense and for low cost Arachne activators. Kath for defense, a lot of low cost activators with retain ( Fiamma is VERY VERY USEFUL in this setup) and also for damage

content: thx

should i ppull on arachne banner
If I’m on mobile, can I play my same account from pc?
yes
Uh well, Arachne does really well against lower hp enemies so would probably demolish the early game
so i think its deffo worth it, at least just 1 copy of arachne (:
early game kinda sucks pulling on ultra banner, but should work out, you'll get standard pulls and other units from there
is it worth going for wheels or is that more late gaem stuff
also should i pull on moonless guide banner
Moonless is good but you need to pick the right characters
If recommend Thais Horla Helot Catena and either Murphy or Miryam
wheels are very important, but not all wheels are created equal, especially in act 1
act 1 wheels is mostly just the R wheels, then throughout the game after you pull a good team you throw all your standard pulls in the standard wheel banner

so like if you have a team (not this team per-say), this is what your wheels would look like for like the early game. Your best wheels for your damage dealer (Helot: Catena in this case, the left wheel is Blade of the Titan from the standard wheel banner and the right one you'll just get from pulling literally anything) and the rest are on these R wheels
R wheels are broken (:
